next_steps: Perform lumbar puncture for CSF analysis (cytology, flow cytometry, PCR for EBV and JC virus, and IgG index/oligoclonal bands)
Obtain permanent sections and immunohistochemistry from existing brain biopsy (CD20, CD3, GFAP, Ki-67, IDH1/2 status)
Perform whole-body PET/CT to evaluate for systemic occult malignancy
Re-evaluate for potential opportunistic infections in the context of long-term immunosuppression with mycophenolate mofetil
Monitor for progressive neurological deficit and consider repeat tissue sampling if initial pathology remains inconclusive
Continue corticosteroids pending definitive histological diagnosis
